gates.name: Candidate Registry Gate
gates.notes: Candidate must be registered before release path.

gates.name: Reference Blueprint Gate
gates.notes: Must align with reference page blueprint.

gates.name: Content Quality Gate
gates.notes: Standard defined Sprint 14 (DEC-032). Public release and draft generation remain blocked until publisher dry-run harness and governance approval.

gates.name: Claim Source Traceability Gate
gates.notes: All material claims must be traceable.

gates.name: Source Scope Gate
gates.notes: Source scope must be defined and bounded.

gates.name: Route Link Integrity Gate
gates.notes: Route and internal links must pass integrity checks.

gates.name: Technical Quality Gate
gates.notes: Static technical quality must pass.

gates.name: Interface Governance Gate
gates.notes: No scanner/detector/scoring visual logic.

gates.name: Security Privacy Gate
gates.notes: Zero-data static security posture.

gates.name: Forbidden Language Gate
gates.notes: Adversarial language policy must pass.

gates.name: Sitemap Eligibility Gate
gates.notes: Sitemap entry only when route eligible.

gates.name: Human Governance Approval Gate
gates.notes: Explicit approval required.

gates.name: Final validate_all.py Gate
gates.notes: Canonical validation command must pass.

gates.name: Audit Record Gate
gates.notes: Sprint or release audit required.

gates.name: Structured Data and Semantic SEO Governance Gate
gates.notes: Standard defined Sprint 15 (DEC-033). Does not authorize publishing. Publisher remains blocked until first reference candidate pack.
